meta.title: Colossal Cave Adventure
meta.description: The classic text adventure by Will Crowther and Don Woods. Explore a vast cave system, collect treasures, and avoid dangers.
aiThinkingMessages: A hollow wind echoes through the cavern...
Water drips somewhere in the darkness...
The cave seems to shift around you...
Shadows dance at the edge of your lamp light...
You hear a faint rumble from deep below...

properties.name: friendly
properties.description: Whether an NPC is friendly to the player

properties.name: following
properties.description: Whether an NPC is following the player

properties.name: questioning
properties.description: Whether the dragon is asking about bare hands

properties.name: treasured
properties.description: Whether the troll has been paid with a treasure

properties.name: spotted
properties.description: Whether the pirate has been spotted

properties.name: rich
properties.description: Whether the pirate has stolen treasure

properties.name: scored_take
properties.description: Whether take-score has been awarded for this treasure

properties.name: scored_found
properties.description: Whether find-score has been awarded for this treasure

properties.name: caveClosing
properties.description: Whether the cave closing sequence is active

properties.name: caveClosed
properties.description: Whether the cave has fully closed

properties.name: feeCount
properties.description: Progress through the fee-fie-foe-foo magic word sequence

properties.name: prevRoom
properties.description: Previous room for dwarf movement (avoid backtracking)

properties.name: dead
properties.description: Whether this dwarf has been killed
